allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('public/data/districts.geojson','utf8'\)\);const f=d.features;console.log\('Total:',f.length\);const s={};for\(const x of f\){const k=x.properties.SIDO||'';s[k]=\(s[k]||0\)+1;}for\(const [k,v] of Object.entries\(s\).sort\(\)\)console.log\(JSON.stringify\(k\),v\);console.log\('props0:',JSON.stringify\(f[0].properties\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('public/data/districts.geojson','utf8'\)\);const f=d.features;const byS={};for\(const x of f\){const s=x.properties.SIDO;if\(!byS[s]\)byS[s]=[];if\(byS[s].length<3\)byS[s].push\(x.properties.SGG_Code\);}for\(const[s,cs]of Object.entries\(byS\)\)console.log\(s,'->',cs.join\(', '\)\);")
